mapper.select: WITH chapter_stats AS ( SELECT tqb.textbook_catalog_id, tqb.id as bank_id, -- 题库总分 qbl.total_score as bank_total_score, sfg.student_id, sfg.final_score as student_final_score, -- 计算每个学生的得分率 CASE WHEN qbl.total_score > 0 THEN sfg.final_score * 1.0 / qbl.total_score ELSE 0 END as student_score_rate, -- 判断是否正确（得分率 >= 60%） CASE WHEN qbl.total_score > 0 AND (sfg.final_score * 1.0 / qbl.total_score) >= 0.6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as is_correct FROM teaching_question_bank tqb -- 题库总分 INNER JOIN ( SELECT bank_id, SUM(score) as total_score FROM questions_banks_list GROUP BY bank_id ) qbl ON tqb.id = qbl.bank_id -- 学生答题（每个学生取最高分） LEFT JOIN ( SELECT bank_id, student_id, MAX(final_score) as final_score FROM student_final_grade GROUP BY bank_id, student_id ) sfg ON tqb.id = sfg.bank_id WHERE tqb.textbook_id = #{textbookId} AND tqb.status = 1 ) SELECT tc.id as chapterId, tc.catalog_name as chapterName, tc.catalog_level as chapterLevel, tc.father_catalog_id as parentChapterId, tc.sort as chapterSort, COUNT(DISTINCT cs.bank_id) as questionBankCount, COUNT(DISTINCT cs.student_id || '-' || cs.bank_id) as totalAnswerCount, SUM(cs.is_correct) as correctAnswerCount, CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT cs.student_id || '-' || cs.bank_id) = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE ROUND( SUM(cs.is_correct) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT cs.student_id || '-' || cs.bank_id), 2 ) END as correctRate, ROUND(AVG(cs.student_score_rate) * 100, 2) as avgScoreRate FROM textbook_catalog tc LEFT JOIN chapter_stats cs ON tc.id = cs.textbook_catalog_id WHERE tc.textbook_id = #{textbookId} GROUP BY tc.id, tc.catalog_name, tc.catalog_level, tc.father_catalog_id, tc.sort ORDER BY tc.catalog_level, tc.sort

SELECT DISTINCT t.id as textbookId, t.textbook_name as textbookName, t.type as textbookType, t.textbook_publishing_house as textbookPublishingHouse, t.textbook_version as textbookVersion, t.release_status as releaseStatus, c.course_name as courseName, g.name as className FROM textbook t INNER JOIN course_textbook_list ctl ON t.id = ctl.textbook_id INNER JOIN course c ON ctl.course_id = c.id INNER JOIN course_class_list ccl ON c.id = ccl.course_id INNER JOIN "group" g ON ccl.class_id = g.id INNER JOIN user_class_list ucl ON g.id = ucl.class_id WHERE ucl.user_id = #{teacherId} AND ucl.type = 2 ORDER BY t.textbook_name

WITH teacher_accessible_textbooks AS ( -- 先获取教师可以访问的所有教材ID（避免主查询JOIN链） SELECT DISTINCT ctl.textbook_id FROM user_class_list ucl INNER JOIN course_class_list ccl ON ucl.class_id = ccl.class_id INNER JOIN course_textbook_list ctl ON ccl.course_id = ctl.course_id WHERE ucl.user_id = #{teacherId} AND ucl.type = 2 ), textbook_correct_rate AS ( -- 修正后的答题正确率统计 SELECT tqb.textbook_id, -- 平均得分率（正确的计算方式） ROUND(AVG( CASE WHEN qbl.total_score > 0 THEN sfg.final_score * 1.0 / qbl.total_score ELSE 0 END ) * 100, 2) as question_correct_rate FROM teaching_question_bank tqb -- 题库总分 INNER JOIN ( SELECT bank_id, SUM(score) as total_score FROM questions_banks_list GROUP BY bank_id ) qbl ON tqb.id = qbl.bank_id -- 学生答题（每个学生取最高分） LEFT JOIN ( SELECT bank_id, student_id, MAX(final_score) as final_score FROM student_final_grade GROUP BY bank_id, student_id ) sfg ON tqb.id = sfg.bank_id WHERE tqb.status = 1 GROUP BY tqb.textbook_id ), textbook_material_stats AS ( -- 合并素材统计，避免多次JOIN SELECT mtm.textbook_id, COUNT(*) as material_count, -- 各类素材数量 COUNT(CASE WHEN tm.type = 'image' THEN 1 END) as image_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN tm.type = 'video' THEN 1 END) as video_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN tm.type = 'audio' THEN 1 END) as audio_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN tm.type = '3DModel' THEN 1 END) as model3d_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN tm.type = 'link' THEN 1 END) as link_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN tm.type = 'ppt' THEN 1 END) as ppt_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN tm.type = 'pdf' THEN 1 END) as pdf_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN tm.type = 'word' THEN 1 END) as word_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN tm.type = 'excel' THEN 1 END) as excel_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN tm.type = 'H5' THEN 1 END) as h5_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN tm.type = 'simulation' THEN 1 END) as simulation_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN tm.type = 'other' THEN 1 END) as other_count FROM materials_textbook_mapping mtm JOIN teaching_materials tm ON mtm.material_id = tm.id GROUP BY mtm.textbook_id ) SELECT t.id as textbookId, t.textbook_name as textbookName, -- 阅读人数 COALESCE(reader_stats.reader_count, 0) as readerCount, -- 教学活动数量 COALESCE(activity_stats.teaching_activity_count, 0) as teachingActivityCount, -- 素材总数 COALESCE(material_stats.material_count, 0) as materialCount, -- 交流反馈数量 COALESCE(feedback_stats.communication_feedback_count, 0) as communicationFeedbackCount, -- 教学思政数量 COALESCE(ideological_stats.ideological_material_count, 0) as ideologicalMaterialCount, -- 答题正确率（修正后） COALESCE(correct_rate.question_correct_rate, 0) as questionCorrectRate, -- 交流反馈参与量 COALESCE(participation_stats.communication_participation_count, 0) as communicationParticipationCount, -- 知识点批注量 COALESCE(annotation_stats.annotation_count, 0) as annotationCount, -- 各类素材数量 COALESCE(material_stats.image_count, 0) as imageMaterialCount, COALESCE(material_stats.video_count, 0) as videoMaterialCount, COALESCE(material_stats.audio_count, 0) as audioMaterialCount, COALESCE(material_stats.model3d_count, 0) as model3dMaterialCount, COALESCE(material_stats.link_count, 0) as linkMaterialCount, COALESCE(material_stats.ppt_count, 0) as pptMaterialCount, COALESCE(material_stats.pdf_count, 0) as pdfMaterialCount, COALESCE(material_stats.word_count, 0) as wordMaterialCount, COALESCE(material_stats.excel_count, 0) as excelMaterialCount, COALESCE(material_stats.h5_count, 0) as h5MaterialCount, COALESCE(material_stats.simulation_count, 0) as simulationMaterialCount, COALESCE(material_stats.other_count, 0) as otherMaterialCount FROM textbook t -- 只查询教师可访问的教材 INNER JOIN teacher_accessible_textbooks tat ON t.id = tat.textbook_id -- 其他统计LEFT JOIN LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计阅读人数 SELECT ctl.textbook_id, COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) as reader_count FROM student s INNER JOIN user_class_list ucl ON s.user_id = ucl.user_id INNER JOIN course_class_list ccl ON ucl.class_id = ccl.class_id INNER JOIN course_textbook_list ctl ON ccl.course_id = ctl.course_id WHERE ucl.type = 1 GROUP BY ctl.textbook_id ) reader_stats ON t.id = reader_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计教学活动数量 SELECT dt.textbook_id, COUNT(*) as teaching_activity_count FROM discussion_topic dt GROUP BY dt.textbook_id ) activity_stats ON t.id = activity_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN textbook_material_stats material_stats ON t.id = material_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计交流反馈数量 SELECT dt.textbook_id, COUNT(dtr.id) as communication_feedback_count FROM discussion_topic dt LEFT JOIN discussion_topic_reply dtr ON dt.id = dtr.topic_id GROUP BY dt.textbook_id ) feedback_stats ON t.id = feedback_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计教学思政数量 SELECT im.textbook_id, COUNT(*) as ideological_material_count FROM ideological_material im GROUP BY im.textbook_id ) ideological_stats ON t.id = ideological_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN textbook_correct_rate correct_rate ON t.id = correct_rate.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计交流反馈参与量 SELECT dt.textbook_id, COUNT(DISTINCT dtr.creator) as communication_participation_count FROM discussion_topic dt LEFT JOIN discussion_topic_reply dtr ON dt.id = dtr.topic_id GROUP BY dt.textbook_id ) participation_stats ON t.id = participation_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计知识点批注量 SELECT ta.textbook_id, COUNT(*) as annotation_count FROM teacher_annotation ta GROUP BY ta.textbook_id ) annotation_stats ON t.id = annotation_stats.textbook_id WHERE 1=1
AND t.textbook_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{textbookName}, '%')
ORDER BY t.textbook_name

SELECT s.id as studentId, s.name as studentName, COALESCE(reading_stats.reading_duration, 0) as readingDuration, CASE WHEN COALESCE(reading_stats.reading_duration, 0) >= 300 THEN '高' WHEN COALESCE(reading_stats.reading_duration, 0) >= 150 THEN '中' ELSE '低' END as learningBehavior, COALESCE(chapter_stats.chapter_count, 0) as chapterCount, reading_stats.last_reading_time as lastReadingTime, COALESCE(progress_stats.progress_percentage, 0) as progressPercentage FROM student s INNER JOIN user_class_list ucl ON s.user_id = ucl.user_id INNER JOIN course_class_list ccl ON ucl.class_id = ccl.class_id INNER JOIN course_textbook_list ctl ON ccl.course_id = ctl.course_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计学生阅读时长 SELECT ll.creator, COUNT(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ll2.add_datetime::timestamp) - EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ll.add_datetime::timestamp) BETWEEN 55 AND 65 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) as reading_duration, MAX(ll.add_datetime) as last_reading_time FROM learning_log ll LEFT JOIN learning_log ll2 ON ll.creator = ll2.creator AND ll.textbook_id = ll2.textbook_id AND ll2.add_datetime > ll.add_datetime AND ll2.id = ( SELECT id FROM learning_log WHERE creator = ll.creator AND textbook_id = ll.textbook_id AND add_datetime > ll.add_datetime ORDER BY add_datetime ASC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE ll.textbook_id = #{textbookId} GROUP BY ll.creator ) reading_stats ON s.user_id = reading_stats.creator LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计学生阅读章节数 SELECT ll.creator, COUNT(DISTINCT ll.catalogue_id) as chapter_count FROM learning_log ll WHERE ll.textbook_id = #{textbookId} GROUP BY ll.creator ) chapter_stats ON s.user_id = chapter_stats.creator LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计学习进度 SELECT ll.creator, ROUND((COUNT(DISTINCT ll.catalogue_id) * 100.0 / ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM textbook_catalog WHERE textbook_id = #{textbookId} )), 2) as progress_percentage FROM learning_log ll WHERE ll.textbook_id = #{textbookId} GROUP BY ll.creator ) progress_stats ON s.user_id = progress_stats.creator WHERE ctl.textbook_id = #{textbookId} AND ucl.type = 1 ORDER BY reading_stats.reading_duration DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 20

WITH student_scores AS ( -- 先计算每个学生在每个题库的得分率 SELECT tqb.textbook_catalog_id, tqb.id as bank_id, sfg.student_id, -- 题库总分 SUM(qbl.score) as bank_total_score, -- 学生最高分 sfg.final_score, -- 学生得分率 CASE WHEN SUM(qbl.score) > 0 THEN sfg.final_score * 1.0 / SUM(qbl.score) ELSE 0 END as score_rate, -- 是否合格（得分率≥60%） CASE WHEN SUM(qbl.score) > 0 AND sfg.final_score * 1.0 / SUM(qbl.score) >= 0.6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as is_passed FROM teaching_question_bank tqb -- 关联题目，计算题库总分 LEFT JOIN questions_banks_list qbl ON tqb.id = qbl.bank_id -- 关联学生成绩（每个学生取最高分） LEFT JOIN ( SELECT bank_id, student_id, MAX(final_score) as final_score FROM student_final_grade GROUP BY bank_id, student_id ) sfg ON tqb.id = sfg.bank_id WHERE tqb.textbook_id = #{textbookId} AND tqb.status = 1 GROUP BY tqb.textbook_catalog_id, tqb.id, sfg.student_id, sfg.final_score ), chapter_questions AS ( -- 统计每个章节的题目数量 SELECT tqb.textbook_catalog_id, COUNT(DISTINCT qbl.question_id) as total_questions FROM teaching_question_bank tqb LEFT JOIN questions_banks_list qbl ON tqb.id = qbl.bank_id WHERE tqb.textbook_id = #{textbookId} AND tqb.status = 1 GROUP BY tqb.textbook_catalog_id ) SELECT tc.id as chapterId, tc.catalog_name as chapterName, -- 掌握度 = 平均得分率 COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(ss.score_rate) * 100, 2), 0) as masteryLevel, -- 题目总数（正确） COALESCE(cq.total_questions, 0) as totalQuestions, -- 正确答题次数（合格的学生-题库组合） COALESCE(SUM(ss.is_passed), 0) as correctAnswers, -- 正确率 = 合格率（基于学生答题） CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT ss.student_id || '-' || ss.bank_id) > 0 THEN ROUND( SUM(ss.is_passed) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT ss.student_id || '-' || ss.bank_id), 2 ) ELSE 0 END as correctRate, -- 参与学生数 COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT ss.student_id), 0) as participantCount, -- 平均得分（转换成分数，可选） COALESCE( ROUND( AVG( CASE WHEN ss.bank_total_score > 0 THEN ss.final_score * 100.0 / ss.bank_total_score ELSE 0 END ), 2 ), 0 ) as averageScore, tc.catalog_level as chapterLevel, tc.father_catalog_id as parentChapterId, -- 排序字段（达梦要求 ORDER BY 字段必须出现在 SELECT / GROUP BY 中） tc.sort as chapterSort FROM textbook_catalog tc LEFT JOIN chapter_questions cq ON tc.id = cq.textbook_catalog_id LEFT JOIN student_scores ss ON tc.id = ss.textbook_catalog_id WHERE tc.textbook_id = #{textbookId} GROUP BY tc.id, tc.catalog_name, tc.catalog_level, tc.father_catalog_id, cq.total_questions, tc.sort ORDER BY tc.catalog_level, tc.sort

SELECT tc.id as "chapterId", tc.catalog_name as "chapterName", tc.catalog_level as "chapterLevel", tc.father_catalog_id as "parentChapterId", COALESCE(student_stats.question_answering_duration, 0) as "questionAnsweringDuration", COALESCE(student_stats.chapter_score, 0) as "chapterScore", COALESCE(student_stats.correct_rate, 0) as "correctRate", COALESCE(student_stats.total_questions, 0) as "totalQuestions", COALESCE(student_stats.correct_answers, 0) as "correctAnswers", COALESCE(student_stats.average_score, 0) as "averageScore", COALESCE(reading_stats.reading_duration, 0) as "readingDuration", COALESCE(student_stats.mastery_percentage, 0) as "masteryPercentage" FROM textbook_catalog tc LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计学生章节做题情况（保持原始计算逻辑） SELECT tqb.textbook_catalog_id, COUNT(DISTINCT tqb.id) as questionBankCount, COUNT(sfg.id) as total_questions, CASE WHEN SUM(qbl.total_score) > 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(sfg.final_score) / SUM(qbl.total_score)) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END as correct_rate, SUM(CASE WHEN qbl.total_score > 0 AND (sfg.final_score / qbl.total_score) >= 0.6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as correct_answers, CASE WHEN COUNT(sfg.id) > 0 THEN ROUND(AVG(sfg.final_score), 2) ELSE 0 END as average_score, CASE WHEN SUM(qbl.total_score) > 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(sfg.final_score) / SUM(qbl.total_score)) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END as chapter_score, CASE WHEN SUM(qbl.total_score) > 0 AND COUNT(sfg.id) > 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(sfg.final_score) / SUM(qbl.total_score)) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END as mastery_percentage, CASE WHEN COUNT(sfg.id) > 0 THEN COUNT(sfg.id) * 5 ELSE 0 END as question_answering_duration FROM teaching_question_bank tqb LEFT JOIN ( SELECT bank_id, SUM(score) as total_score FROM questions_banks_list GROUP BY bank_id ) qbl ON tqb.id = qbl.bank_id LEFT JOIN student_final_grade sfg ON tqb.id = sfg.bank_id AND sfg.student_id = #{studentId} WHERE tqb.textbook_id = #{textbookId} AND tqb.status = 1 GROUP BY tqb.textbook_catalog_id ) student_stats ON tc.id = student_stats.textbook_catalog_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计学生章节阅读时长（修复达梦时间差函数） SELECT catalogue_id, ROUND(SUM(duration_seconds) / 60) as reading_duration FROM ( SELECT ll1.catalogue_id, -- 使用 DATEDIFF 计算秒数差 EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ll2.add_datetime - ll1.add_datetime)) as duration_seconds FROM ( SELECT catalogue_id, add_datetime, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY add_datetime) as rn FROM learning_log WHERE textbook_id = #{textbookId} AND creator = (SELECT user_id FROM student WHERE id = #{studentId}) ) ll1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT catalogue_id, add_datetime, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY add_datetime) as rn FROM learning_log WHERE textbook_id = #{textbookId} AND creator = (SELECT user_id FROM student WHERE id = #{studentId}) ) ll2 ON ll1.rn = ll2.rn - 1 -- 修复 EXTRACT 为 DATEDIFF WHERE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ll2.add_datetime - ll1.add_datetime)) BETWEEN 55 AND 65 AND ll1.catalogue_id IS NOT NULL ) AS intervals -- 确保派生表有别名 GROUP BY catalogue_id ) reading_stats ON tc.id = reading_stats.catalogue_id WHERE tc.textbook_id = #{textbookId} ORDER BY tc.catalog_level, tc.sort
